mapper.insert: MERGE INTO scrum (user_id, org_id, scrum_date, tasks_json, blocker, blocker_severity, energy, focus, last_slack_sync_at, updated_at) KEY (user_id, scrum_date) VALUES (#{userId}, #{orgId}, #{scrumDate}, #{tasksJson}, #{blocker}, #{blockerSeverity}, #{energy}, #{focus}, #{lastSlackSyncAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT s.*, u.name AS user_name FROM scrum s LEFT JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.id WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND s.scrum_date = #{date}
SELECT s.*, u.name AS user_name FROM scrum s INNER JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.id WHERE s.org_id = #{orgId} AND s.scrum_date = #{date} ORDER BY u.name

SELECT s.*, u.name AS user_name FROM scrum s INNER JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.id WHERE s.org_id = #{orgId} AND s.scrum_date = #{date} AND s.blocker IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(s.blocker) != '' ORDER BY CASE s.blocker_severity WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 1 WHEN 'MED' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, u.name

SELECT u.id AS USERID, u.name AS USERNAME, s.scrum_date AS SCRUMDATE, s.energy AS ENERGY FROM scrum s INNER JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.id WHERE s.org_id = #{orgId} AND s.scrum_date >= #{startDate} AND s.scrum_date <= #{endDate} ORDER BY u.name, s.scrum_date
